fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder" /> is a static class that encodes <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> images to WebP format. It supports both single-frame encoding and animated WebP encoding via <c>EncodeAnimated</c>.

Use the <c>Encode</c> overloads that accept an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> return value when you need the encoded bytes in memory, or the stream overloads to write directly to a stream.

## Examples

```csharp
using var bitmap = new SKBitmap(100, 100);
var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(bitmap.PeekPixels(), options);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides methods to encode images and animations to WebP format.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding fails.
fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP format and returns the result as <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" />.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The destination stream to write the encoded WebP data to.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP format and writes the result to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWStream" />.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The destination stream to write the encoded WebP data to.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP format and writes the result to a <see cref="T:System.IO.Stream" />.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (System.IO.Stream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded animated WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding fails.

params.frames: The frames to encode. Each frame's <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame.Pixmap" /> must not be null.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP and returns the result as <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" />.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? EncodeAnimated (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.frames: The frames to encode. Each frame's <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame.Pixmap" /> must not be null.
params.dst: The destination stream to write the encoded animated WebP data to.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP and writes the result to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWStream" />.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.frames: The frames to encode. Each frame's <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame.Pixmap" /> must not be null.
params.dst: The destination stream to write the encoded animated WebP data to.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP and writes the result to a <see cref="T:System.IO.Stream" />.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (System.IO.Stream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);
